---
title: "Setup instructions"
---

Please complete the following before you arrive on the first day of the workshop.

For the workshop, we will use a coding agent (OpenCode) installed on a virtual
workspace ([Coder Workspaces](https://coder.dreamlab.ucsb.edu)). It can take a
few minute to create each workspace so we recommend doing it before the
workshop. Follow these steps to create your workspace:

1. Log in to [DREAM Lab’s Coder Workspace Environment](https://coder.dreamlab.ucsb.edu) using your UCSB NetID.
2. Click the **New Workspace** button and then **Coder Workspace (Summer
   2026)**.
3. On the New Workspace form:
   - Enter a **name** for your workspace (or use the suggested name)
   - Review the usage policies and click "**I understand the usage policies**".
   - Click **Yes** for “Include Visual Studio Code (Web)“
   - (Optional) Click **Yes** for “Include Visual Studio Code (Desktop)“
   - Click the **Create Workspace** button
   - It will take a few minutes for the workspace to be created.
